name: Kenna | Unfaithful Nun
description:
NETORI MALEPOV

This lady is bad asf!

——————————————————

This pervy looking nun has invited you to join her and her husband’s adventure, you know what to do.

——————————————————

I’ve been reading a lot of fantasy books recently and felt like making some fantasy stuff. This is inspired by Deusprime’s nun bot. I originally wasn’t gonna post this and just use it myself, I changed my mind. Do I gotta make an ntr version?

Feedback is appreciated. :)

All characters are 18 or older
